title: salix × kotulae
intro: Salix × kotulae, also known as the Kotula willow, is a hybrid willow plant that belongs to the Salicaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain due to its salicylic acid content. The health benefits of Salix × kotulae include its potential to lower fever, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system. Salix × kotulae can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular choice among herbalists for its therapeutic uses.
